title: The Milkyway SMP v1 beta (outdated)
description: This modpack was made for a test version of ?????? SMP server. A newer version much better will see the light of day as ?????? SMP v1 soon!
body:
# About The Milkyway SMP v1 beta:

This is a modpack for the Milkyway SMP, an SMP with friends that plays together. I recommend playing this with your own friends too, as it gives a better experience! If you have some suggestion or bug of the modpack to report, please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/kN37Wpmgsn) to do so! PS: This modpack will not be further updated as we are working on the official first season of The Milkyway SMP. You can find the new modpack for the upcoming SMP that will start live on Twitch soon at the link used for this project.

# Features:

A modpack based on mods for Fabric in 1.20.1.

- The create mods
- The Steam n rails mods
- The Ad Astra mods
- Some quality of life changes, like mouse tweaks
- Performance improvement for the best experience with Sodium and other mods
- Iris shaders installed to play with insane lighting
- Terralith and Tectonic for overworld generation
- Incendium and NullSpace for the Nether and the End
- The Tardis REFINED mods
- And many more...

# How to install this modpack on a server:

For now you have to go on the list of mods and put only the one required on the server-side to be installed. I recommend installing Chunky to do some pregeneration of the maps you play!

# Creator social media:

You can follow me there to get info about modpack updates or to see the SMP!

- [Follow me on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRWkt7YwZJM-rxXpNQeum0Q)
- [Follow me on Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/peperehobbits01)
- [Follow me on Mastodon](https://mastodon.social/@Peperehobbits01)
- [Follow me on GitHub (for new projects I may create!).](https://github.com/Peperehobbits01)

# Big thanks to Project Heberg for hosting the SMP; check their offer out [here](https://www.projectheberg.fr/).
